name: Acetaminophen
rationale: COX-1/2 weak inhibitor; CNS-mediated analgesia; no mast-cell mechanism.

name: Caffeine
rationale: Adenosine receptor antagonist; PDE inhibitor at high doses; no documented MCAS therapeutic effect.

name: Metformin
rationale: AMPK activator / hepatic gluconeogenesis suppressor; unrelated to mast-cell pathways.

name: Atorvastatin
rationale: Cholesterol biosynthesis inhibitor; pleiotropic but no mast-cell-specific evidence.

name: Simvastatin
rationale: Same class as above; double-coverage of the statin chemotype.

name: Lisinopril
rationale: Angiotensin-converting enzyme inhibitor; cardiovascular indication only.

name: Amlodipine
rationale: Dihydropyridine CCB; vascular smooth-muscle target; not mast-cell related.

name: Warfarin
rationale: VKORC1 inhibitor; clotting factor synthesis; no immune cell mechanism.

name: Levothyroxine
rationale: T4 hormone replacement; nuclear receptor agonist; not mast-cell relevant.

name: Furosemide
rationale: Na-K-2Cl cotransporter inhibitor in loop of Henle; renal pharmacology only.

name: Methylphenidate
rationale: Monoamine reuptake inhibitor; ADHD indication; no mast-cell mechanism.

name: Levetiracetam
rationale: Synaptic vesicle protein 2A modulator; seizure indication; not immune.

name: Diazepam
rationale: GABA receptor positive allosteric modulator; not mast-cell related.

name: Allopurinol
rationale: Purine metabolism; gout therapy; no mast-cell signaling overlap.

name: Clopidogrel
rationale: Platelet ADP receptor antagonist; cardiovascular indication only.

name: Alendronate
rationale: Farnesyl pyrophosphate synthase inhibitor in osteoclasts; bone metabolism.

name: Isotretinoin
rationale: Retinoic acid receptor agonist; sebaceous gland effect; not mast-cell.

name: Finasteride
rationale: DHT synthesis blockade; endocrine indication only.

name: Donepezil
rationale: CNS cholinergic enhancement; not mast-cell signaling.

name: Sildenafil
rationale: cGMP-specific phosphodiesterase 5 inhibitor; smooth muscle vasodilator.
